meta.property: Alagarkovil Junction, Madurai - 23.5 Cents Corner Commercial Land

companies.Notes: A major multinational hospitality company expanding its footprint in South India. They have officially signed a management agreement to bring Holiday Inn Express & Suites to Madurai, highlighting active corporate interest in the region's hospitality market.

A hotel ownership and development firm that has partnered with IHG Hotels & Resorts to develop and launch the Holiday Inn Express & Suites in Madurai. They represent a prime, well-funded local developer actively investing in Madurai commercial hospitality real estate.

A highly successful South Indian restaurant and hospitality chain with nearly two decades of operations. They specifically target highway locations with high visibility and convenient parking (such as their active branch on the Madurai-Dindigul highway), making them a prospective buyer for strategic highway corner plots.
Popular restaurant chain in Madurai owned by Tamil actor Soori. Marketing contact number is provided in the source.
Pure veg South Indian restaurant chain expanding in Madurai, with a new outlet opening on Alagarkoil Road.
Operator of about 40 restaurants across Chennai and Bengaluru. Currently looking to expand pan-India with a focus on high-performing highway restaurant formats.
Established South Indian cuisine restaurant chain (MIS 2.0) founded in 2002, specializing in Tamil Nadu style food.
Food franchise brand actively expanding its footprint across Tamil Nadu and surrounding areas.
Chennai-based real estate developer based in Saidapet. Potential commercial buyer for land development projects.
Tamil Nadu property developer targeting NRI investors for DTCP and RERA approved plot opportunities, hosting land meetups in locations like Sharjah.
Chennai-based real estate and housing developer targeting NRIs with investment offerings in Indian properties.
A charitable trust engaged in the construction and management of temples for Lord Gopinath and other deities.
Located at NH-4, Madurai-Dindigul Road, Highways, Thuvariman, Madurai. Splendid banquet hall/marriage hall venue.
Located near Madura College, Madurai. Features the Banyan Hall banquet/party/marriage facility.
Offers banquet and event hall facilities in Madurai.
Located opposite to Lakshmi Ceramics and next to Home Art, Nagamalai Pudhukottai, Madurai.
Convention hall and wedding venue in Madurai.

Modern Kalyana Mandapam and wedding banquet hall located in Madurai.

An electric vehicle charging station provider actively deploying charging infrastructure.
EV charging infrastructure operator active in Tamil Nadu, expanding DC fast charging stations leveraging the state's EV policy incentives.
Provides scalable, modular EV charging solutions for logistics fleet operators, warehouses, and logistics centers.
A pilot project adopted by the Government of India to upgrade highways into E-Highways, expanding a 5,500 km network of e-highways including the route to Kanyakumari.
A rapidly growing QSR franchise with over 70 outlets and a strong national presence looking to expand its footprint.
An established footwear brand with a 60-year industry presence looking to expand retail and franchise operations.

A major food and beverage brand actively targeting strategic expansion and franchise growth in Tier 2 and Tier 3 cities.

companies.Notes: Government tourism office located at West Veli Street, Madurai. Manages tourist information and local facilities in the Madurai district.

Local government administrative authority for the Alanganallur region along the Natham-Alanganallur corridor near the commercial site.

Chennai-based real estate developer and owner of The Residency Hotels. The group is in expansion mode and actively planning to set up a new hotel-cum-convention center in Madurai.

An established premium hotel brand already operating on Alagarkoil Road, Madurai (the exact same corridor as the subject plot), indicating a strong interest in this specific high-traffic commercial micro-market.

Large-scale hospitality and food service corporation that operates multiple highway food courts, malls, airports, and hospital outlets under the brand name The Food Street. Highly suitable buyer for a prime highway corner commercial plot.
A growing Tamil Nadu food business and restaurant franchise empire focused on business expansion along major highways.
